question.label: Team bar fuzzy
question.name: What specifically feels fuzzy about this team's Principal bar?
question.description: Pins down which part of the Principal expectation is unclear so the evidence discussion has a concrete anchor.

answer: I have mostly stayed in my lane instead of forcing cross-team decisions.

assessment.note: He names a specific clarity gap in expected Principal scope, expressed as staying in his lane rather than driving cross-team decisions; also reveals a concrete stakeholder-engagement thread.

new_queue.label: Principal impact evidence
new_queue.name: What have you done recently that best shows Principal-level leverage on this team?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Question-asking pattern
new_queue.name: What makes you hold back from asking questions early?

new_queue.label: Next behavior change
new_queue.name: What is the first change you want to make before our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I can describe Principal impact in general, but this team's bar still feels fuzzy.
I have mostly stayed in my lane instead of forcing cross-team decisions.
